<!-- Thanks for contributing to AI Stack Map. Keep changes neutral and layer-first. -->

## What does this change?

<!-- Brief summary. For data edits, name the tool / app / term / pattern id(s). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Content / data update (`src/data/*`)
- [ ] New catalog entry, glossary term, pattern, or comparison
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature / UI
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (IDs unique, cross-references resolve, anchors exist)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (type-check + production build)
- [ ] Held to the principles: **layers first, neutral tradeoffs, agents optional, no "winning" stack, not a leaderboard**
- [ ] Updated `lastReviewed` on any entry I touched
- [ ] If I added a tab or anchor target, existing deep links still resolve

## Notes for reviewers
